title: sfga: Species File Group Archive schema
description: SFGA (Species File Group Archive) is a SQLite-based schema for biodiversity checklist data exchange. An SFGA file is a self-contained SQLite database that can be queried immediately with standard SQL tools — no import step required. The schema is a superset of the Catalogue of Life Data Package (CoLDP) format and serves as the foundation of the SFBorg ecosystem of biodiversity data tools.

creators.name: Mozzherin, Dmitry
